mandatory_clauses.description: Names of the intern, the employer/host organisation, and the educational institution
Start and end dates of the internship
Name of the school or university and the degree programme
Learning goals and competencies the intern is expected to develop
Name or role of the workplace supervisor responsible for the intern

Internship allowance (stagevergoeding) amount, or explicit statement that no allowance is paid. Note: genuine curricular internships are exempt from minimum wage, but payment below minimum wage for non-curricular interns is illegal.
Expected weekly hours (must not exceed regular working hours)
